payload.notes: Planning amendment only: reuse docs/product, docs/decisions, docs/stories, docs/templates, docs/contracts, and docs/reviews; do not implement or publish V1 behavior
payload.summary: Revise V1 refactor plan to preserve current repository paths for existing users

payload.evidence: Accepted V1 plan amended for existing-user path stability: docs/product, docs/decisions, docs/stories, docs/templates, docs/contracts, docs/reviews, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, and docs/README.md remain in place; focused docs contracts and full scripts/validate-premerge.sh passed with 90 Rust tests.

payload.actions_taken: ["bootstrapped isolated Harness state","inventoried current documentation paths","amended installed shape and role mappings","added existing-user migration contract","updated implementation phases","ran focused and full validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Reuse current V0 documentation paths as V1 defaults","Treat design documentation as decision records","Keep work plans and history under docs/stories","Reuse current upstream source paths instead of adding templates/core","Make the provenance manifest the only required new tracked path"]
payload.errors: ["Root bootstrap refused the Symphony-owned shared database as designed","An initial status CAS omitted the required JSON mode and was retried correctly"]
payload.harness_friction: The shared root database contains Symphony-owned state so plan evidence required the supported isolated database; V1 already removes this operational database from the default core.
payload.notes: Detailed trace used because the amendment changes architecture direction and source-path policy; duration and token count are estimates.
payload.task_summary: Amended the V1 refactor plan to preserve existing repository paths

payload.description: User challenged the proposed product-specs, design-docs, exec-plans, and parallel template source paths because the repository already has users and reusable current paths.
payload.impact: Refactor plan now keeps current V0 knowledge paths as V1 defaults and requires zero cosmetic moves for standard migration.
